content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Indices are mildly weak (Nifty -0.61%, BankNifty -0.98%, VIX +2.89%) but breadth in mid-caps is strong with multiple Q4-driven moves (COFORGE +14.88%, BHARATFORG +8.31%, PIDILITIND +8.79%, SRF +10.55%, POLYCAB +9.64%). Book is +1.27% on the day with 11 of 13 names green or near-flat. Priority is locking in gains via SL trails on the strong movers, not chasing more entries with cash already at 37% deployed headroom.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +9.1%, CMP 1073. Current SL 1064.67 sits ~0.8% below CMP — too tight, will get whipsawed on normal intraday noise. Loosen slightly to 1048 (~2.3% below CMP, still locks in ~6.5% gain from 984 entry). Thesis intact — Q4 PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%, brokerage TPs Rs 1,100-1,350. Wait — checking Rule on tightening: SL can only be TIGHTENED, not loosened. Current 1064.67 → proposing 1048 would LOOSEN. Withdraw. Keeping SL at 1064.67 — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Reversing my prior MODIFY — SL 1064.67 already tight (0.8% below CMP) and locks in +8.2% gain. Cannot loosen per rules. Hold; position approaching target 1135 from current 1073 — let it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF holding -0.4%. SL 121 (3% below CMP 124.65) is appropriate. Gold today +2% recovering. Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Wait — checking for binary event: HAL Q4 board meeting May 14 (4 trading sessions away — within 3-session binary window by Tuesday). Position +3.8%, CMP 4758, SL 4725.56 already tight (~0.7% below CMP). Per Rule 11, default for held position into binary = exit/trim/tighten. SL is already tight — but trail-gap discipline (Rule 17b) says SL must be ≥1% below LTP. 4725 is 0.7% below 4758 — too close, forced exit risk. The right action with binary event 4 sessions out is to trim/exit. Switching to EXIT."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 11,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting May 14 (4 sessions). Stock +31% in past month at stretched 30x P/E with elevated expectations. Asymmetric tail into binary results justifies booking +3.8% (~Rs 1,900) rather than holding through. Per Rule 11 disposition (a). Replaces the MODIFY above."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Same SL/target — no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9%, CMP 827. Q4 PAT +18%, revenue +22%. SL 822 is 0.6% below CMP — borderline tight but stock just made record high; existing SL preserves the entry. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.7%, CMP 1342.70. SL 1329.47 already locks in solid gain (+5.6% from entry 1259), only ~1% below CMP. Cannot tighten further without violating 1% trail-gap floor. Q4 results phenomenal (PAT 612 vs 261 cr, revenue +30%). Target 1395 within reach. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.6%, CMP 3082.80. Current SL 3025 = entry breakeven. Trailing SL up to 3030 is a tiny micro-adjust (<0.5%) — that's wasted signal per rules. Switching to HOLD. SL gap of 1.9% below CMP is appropriate for a high-vol defence name."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Reversing prior MODIFY — adjustment below 0.5% threshold = wasted signal. SL 3025 (entry breakeven) is 1.9% below CMP, acceptable trail gap. FY26 revenue +38%, defence theme strong. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +4.3%, CMP 842.35. SL 827.41 = 1.8% below CMP, locks in +2.6% gain. Q4 results positive. Hold; target 875 within reach."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7%, CMP 1484.10. Big intraday gap up (+8.79%) on Q4 PAT +36.6%. Entry caught the late add at 1490; CMP just below entry. SL 1445 is 2.6% below CMP — appropriate. Thesis just confirmed by Q4 print. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.5%, CMP 2400. Q4 results just printed (May 7) — PAT +87.5%, US sales +46%, 900% dividend. Stock spiked on results, fading intraday but thesis intact. SL 2370 is 1.3% below CMP, room to work. Hold to SL or target 2540."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4%, CMP 1610. Q4 turnaround real (PAT 164 vs loss of 45). 11.8x volume = strong institutional interest. SL 1580 = 1.9% below CMP, appropriate. Target 1740 generous (+8%). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.2%, CMP 2789. Q4 +10% PAT, FY26 +47% PAT, capex Rs 2,300 cr for refrigerants. SL 2725 = 2.3% below CMP. Hold; target 2920 in reach with momentum."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.5%, CMP 9141. Q4 record revenue Rs 8,864 cr, market share 30-31% (+3-4ppt YoY). Stock at 52w high. SL 9000 = 1.5% below CMP. Hold; target 9550."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7%, CMP 2021.70. Q4 mixed — PAT -17.4% YoY due to KPTL impairment, but defence Q4 +46% with Rs 10,961 cr OB. Stock at 52w high despite PAT miss. SL 1955 = 3.3% below CMP. Hold but watch — if it breaks 2000 with broader weakness, thesis weakens."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GABRIEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Watchlist candidate — but Q4 board meeting May 13 (3 trading sessions), within binary window per Rule 11. No new entry on names with binary event ≤3 sessions unless event-trade sized ≤5%. Current cash deployment plan does not warrant a sub-conviction event-trade. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATATECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "12.8x volume yesterday but today only +1.19% — momentum fading despite strong Q4. EBITDA margin compression YoY. Already heavy IT exposure via COFORGE (large +6.7% winner). No incremental edge to admit a second IT name today."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "THERMAX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already 2 capital-goods names held (POLYCAB, GRSE) plus BHARATFORG (auto/defence). Adding THERMAX would be a 3rd capital-goods cluster name on a single session move — cluster discipline (Rule 10) caps that. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "FINCABLES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Cables/cap-goods cluster duplicate vs POLYCAB already held. Skip per cluster rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already 2 pharma names held (LUPIN, WOCKPHARMA). Adding 3rd pharma without exceptional edge stacks cluster risk. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already 2 financial-services names (PNBHOUSING, CAMS). Adequate sector representation; ABCAPITAL volume signal alone insufficient to add 3rd. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "APOLLOTYRE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Auto-component name; already have BHARATFORG in same cluster. Crude spike a margin headwind. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RAMCOCEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Cement price-hike narrative reasonable but not in research dossier with quantified Q4 catalyst. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Capital goods cluster already represented. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "KPIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Capital goods cluster cap. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Healthcare/hospital — modest move, no specific catalyst that elevates above existing pharma exposure. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Previously exited Day-13. Re-entry cooldown still in effect (Rule 14, 5 sessions). No new post-exit catalyst. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Stale OPEN BUY 600x @ 133.50 placed 3326 minutes ago (over 2 days old) — clearly a leftover from prior session that should not be active as MIS. This is a stale order; would cancel but no CANCEL action in this schema for pending orders. Flagging in portfolio_notes."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1064.67,
      "reasoning": "SL already tight at 1064.67 (0.8% below CMP), cannot loosen. Locks in +8.2% gain. Let target 1135 work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 board May 14 (4 sessions). 30x P/E stretched, +31% past month. Booking +3.8% gain ahead of binary event per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 just confirmed thesis; SL near entry; let target work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1329.47,
      "reasoning": "SL locks in +5.6% gain, 1% below CMP — already at trail-gap floor. Hold to target 1395."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3025.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven, defence theme strong, target 3225 in reach."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 827.41,
      "reasoning": "SL locks in gain. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "reasoning": "Just bought into Q4 confirmation. Let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2370.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 just printed strong; let position absorb post-results volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "Turnaround thesis intact; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2725.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong, refrigerants capex catalyst. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 9000.00,
      "reasoning": "Sector leader at 52w high. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1955.00,
      "reasoning": "Mixed Q4 but defence segment strong. Watch closely; SL 3.3% below CMP gives room."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GABRIEL (May 13 board), KPIL, RAMCOCEM remain on watch — re-evaluate post-events. SOBHA still in 5-session re-entry cooldown. Multiple bullish-rated watchlist names (TATATECH, THERMAX, LAURUSLABS, FINCABLES, APOLLOTYRE, ABCAPITAL) explicitly declined for cluster-discipline reasons (Rule 10) — book already covers IT, capital-goods, pharma, financials, auto-components. Adding more would be correlation-stacking disguised as breadth.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book +1.27% intraday with 13 CNC positions; 11 green, 2 modestly red. Deployment 63% — comfortably under 80% soft target with Rs 372K cash. EXIT on HAL frees ~Rs 52K and removes binary-event risk (May 14 board) per Rule 11. Stale HFCL MIS LIMIT BUY @ 133.50 placed 3326 mins ago (>2 sessions stale) is concerning — schema doesn't support CANCEL here, but flag for execution layer. Strategy emphasis: let winners run via existing tight SLs, no FOMO admits into a session where most watchlist Q4 plays already +8-15% intraday (poor R:R on chasing). Active management of existing book IS the trade today."
}
